estimand.target: ATT for the first treated region during the weeks before the later region starts rollout
estimand.interpretation: Change in activation_rate_14d for north after the north rollout, net of the contemporaneous change in south while south is still not treated.

placebo_checks.label: Fake north rollout on the last pre-period week
Pre-treatment composition covariate should not show a DiD jump

twfe_diagnostic.formula: activation_rate_14d ~ rollout_active + region fixed effects + week fixed effects
twfe_diagnostic.risk: With staggered adoption, naive TWFE can compare later-treated cohorts to already-treated cohorts and can mix dynamic effects with cohort weights.

candidate_designs.label: Primary early-treated north versus not-yet-treated south
candidate_designs.interpretation: Valid teaching contrast if parallel trends, no anticipation and no spillovers are credible.

candidate_designs.label: Placebo rollout before any region is treated
candidate_designs.interpretation: Should be near zero if pre-period trends are parallel.

candidate_designs.label: Late-treated south versus already-treated north
candidate_designs.interpretation: North is already treated during the south pre-window, so it is not an untreated counterfactual control.

candidate_designs.label: Full-panel TWFE coefficient
candidate_designs.interpretation: Useful as a regression reconciliation, not as the primary design choice when adoption is staggered.

assumptions.parallel_trends: North and south would have continued with the same activation-rate trend absent the rollout.
assumptions.no_anticipation: Users and regional teams did not change behavior before the active rollout week.
assumptions.stable_composition: Region-week eligible population remains comparable; mean_friction_score placebo should not jump.
assumptions.no_spillovers: The north rollout does not change south activation before the south rollout.

claim_policy.allowed_wording: Under the stated parallel-trends, no-anticipation, stable-composition and no-spillover assumptions, the early north rollout DiD estimate is +8.0 percentage points.
blocked_wording: parallel trends are guaranteed because pre-trends look flat
the south rollout can use already-treated north as an untreated control
